title: Photos Of An Alien Craft Over Tashkent
description: 11-7-90 TASHKENT UZBEKISTAN On November 7, 1990, a series of photographs were taken over Tashkent from the balcony of an eighth-floor apartment. The witness reported observing an unidentified object that appeared to move with a galloping motion [...]
